situation_summary: Mid-year budget review triggered a mandatory 20% SaaS reduction exercise. Platform was on the shortlist for elimination despite reasonable usage. Decision maker had changed — new CFO was not aware of the platform's value.
risk_signals: new CFO with no platform relationship
renewal decision escalated above CSM contact
silence from primary contact for 18 days
action_taken: Emergency EBR arranged with new CFO. Custom ROI report prepared showing 3,100 hours saved in Q1-Q2. Executive sponsorship from our VP Sales for the call. Multi-year deal with 8% discount proposed to demonstrate partnership.
outcome: Renewed on 2-year deal with 8% discount. CFO became a new executive sponsor. Featured in company case study.
csm_notes: When the CFO is the new decision maker, you need your own executive in the room. The ROI report was essential — always quantify in hours and rupees, not in features. The 2-year deal was the right offer: gave them price certainty and gave us retention.
